/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pointcloud_read.dir/main.cpp.o -o pointcloud_read  /livox_ws/Livox-SDK/build/sdk_core/liblivox_sdk_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_gapi.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_ml.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_photo.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_stitching.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_video.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.4 -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.5.4
